history.notes: Module 08: Rewrite — WordTune-style 5-card rewriter with Paragraph/Sentence mode toggle. Per-card COPY/USE THIS/SPEAK. READ MODE with font/spacing controls and TTS. SEND OUT with INPUT/individual/ALL selector. No voice in toolbar.
Point1: Unified G-MODULE-CODE##-D-MON filename. Point2: Email SEND OUT version selector. Point3: INPUT/OUTPUT selector all modules. Point4: Flash 3 categories (31 topics).
